title: genista tenera
intro: Genista tenera, also known as the tender broom, is a flowering shrub native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia, belonging to the legume family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Genista tenera include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. It is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusions for its medicinal uses.
